and 11398123-29750 or 6458090-(-959048)else h=r(821472-773821)p=y[h]B=425358+-425358 a=J[Z[-1038836+1038844]]h=p(a,B)p=12236037-(-33159)end end else if p<13385037-(-666063)then if p<-504519+14445579 D(u)end,function(y,r)local D=B(r)local K=function(K,Z,H,S)return p(y,{K,Z;H;S},r,D)end return K end return(q(3944877-(-676552),{}))(D(u))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[r(-385766+433431)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
